title: Compressed Air Leak Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to quantify energy and financial losses from compressed air leaks, based on ISO 50001, Lean Six Sigma, and WERC guidelines.

inputs.label: System Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Operating pressure of the compressed air system; higher pressure increases leak flow rate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Operating pressure of the compressed air system; higher pressure increases leak flow rate.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Basınçlı hava sisteminin işletme basıncı; daha yüksek basınç kaçak debisini artırır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Betriebsdruck des Druckluftsystems; höherer Druck erhöht die Leckdurchflussrate.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression de fonctionnement du système d'air comprimé ; une pression plus élevée augmente le débit de fuite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión de operación del sistema de aire comprimido; mayor presión aumenta el caudal de fuga.

inputs.label: Equivalent Leak Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of a round orifice representing the average leak size. Common sizes: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of a round orifice representing the average leak size. Common sizes: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ortalama kaçak boyutunu temsil eden yuvarlak bir orifisin çapı. Yaygın boyutlar: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchmesser einer runden Öffnung, die die durchschnittliche Leckgröße darstellt. Übliche Größen: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".
businessContext_i18n.fr: Diamètre d'un orifice rond représentant la taille moyenne de fuite. Tailles courantes : 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".
businessContext_i18n.es: Diámetro de un orificio redondo que representa el tamaño promedio de fuga. Tamaños comunes: 1/8", 1/4", 1/2".

inputs.label: Number of Leaks
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identified or estimated leaks in the system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of identified or estimated leaks in the system.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sistemde tespit edilen veya tahmin edilen toplam kaçak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der identifizierten oder geschätzten Lecks im System.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de fuites identifiées ou estimées dans le système.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de fugas identificadas o estimadas en el sistema.

inputs.label: Annual Operating Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total hours the compressor runs per year. Continuous operation = 8760 h.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total hours the compressor runs per year. Continuous operation = 8760 h.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresörün yılda çalıştığı toplam saat. Sürekli çalışma = 8760 saat.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbetriebsstunden des Kompressors pro Jahr. Dauerbetrieb = 8760 h.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'heures de fonctionnement du compresseur par an. Fonctionnement continu = 8760 h.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas totales que el compresor funciona al año. Operación continua = 8760 h.

inputs.label: Electricity Cost
inputs.businessContext: Average blended cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average blended cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kilovat-saat başına harmanlanmış ortalama elektrik maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Mischkosten für Strom pro Kilowattstunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût moyen pondéré de l'électricité par kilowattheure.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo promedio combinado de electricidad por kilovatio-hora.

inputs.label: Compressor Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Overall efficiency of the compressor system (motor + drive + compressor). Typical range 70-85%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Overall efficiency of the compressor system (motor + drive + compressor). Typical range 70-85%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kompresör sisteminin genel verimi (motor + sürücü + kompresör). Tipik aralık %70-85.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtwirkungsgrad des Kompressorsystems (Motor + Antrieb + Kompressor). Typischer Bereich 70-85%.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement global du système de compresseur (moteur + variateur + compresseur). Plage typique 70-85 %.
businessContext_i18n.es: Eficiencia general del sistema del compresor (motor + variador + compresor). Rango típico 70-85%.

inputs.label: Leak Type
inputs.businessContext: Geometry of the leak affects discharge coefficient. Round orifice is most common.

businessContext_i18n.en: Geometry of the leak affects discharge coefficient. Round orifice is most common.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kaçağın geometrisi boşaltma katsayısını etkiler. Yuvarlak orifis en yaygın olanıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Geometrie des Lecks beeinflusst den Ausflusskoeffizienten. Runde Öffnung ist am häufigsten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La géométrie de la fuite affecte le coefficient de décharge. L'orifice rond est le plus courant.
businessContext_i18n.es: La geometría de la fuga afecta el coeficiente de descarga. El orificio redondo es el más común.

inputs.label: Include Maintenance Cost
inputs.businessContext: If true, adds estimated labor and material cost for leak repair.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, adds estimated labor and material cost for leak repair.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, sızıntı onarımı için tahmini işçilik ve malzeme maliyeti ekler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, werden geschätzte Arbeits- und Materialkosten für die Leckreparatur hinzugefügt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, ajoute le coût estimé de la main-d'œuvre et des matériaux pour la réparation de fuite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, agrega el costo estimado de mano de obra y material para la reparación de fugas.

rules.message: System pressure must be between 60 and 200 psig.
Leak diameter must be between 0.01 and 1.0 inches.
Compressor efficiency must be between 50% and 95%.

thresholds.message: Annual leak cost exceeds $50,000. Immediate action recommended.
Compressor efficiency below 70%. Consider maintenance or upgrade.
Leak diameter > 0.25 inches indicates large leaks. Prioritize repair.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
